keyPoints: The Execution Layer (EL) handles transaction execution and state changes.
The Consensus Layer (CL) is responsible for block validation and finality using Proof-of-Stake.
The Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) is the runtime environment for smart contracts on the Execution Layer.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Execution Layer with the Consensus Layer (e.g., thinking PoS validators execute transactions).
Assuming 'The Merge' eliminated the need for the Execution Layer (it just swapped the Consensus Layer from PoW to PoS).
